display.name: Refik Fluid of Flora
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A slow horizontal current of botanical imagery suspended in a dark gallery void, with luminous warm accents catching the light.

annotation.technical_notes: A custom texture sampler feeds a dense, gothic floral collage into the composite shader, where it is distorted by a slow, undulating per-pixel warp field. The warp is modulated by low-frequency audio bands, creating a gentle, liquid breathing effect across the tapestry of roses and lilies. High decay in the frame feedback loop maintains the crispness of the painterly details while allowing smooth, dreamlike transitions.
